title: Issue while consuming from kafka through kafka table
description:
### Company or project name
RS Software. POT. Checking Clickhouse capability
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
While consuming from Kafka through kafka table the below error is showing. otherwise it was working before.

### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
25.11.2.24
### How to reproduce
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS rsiedldb.upi_txn_kafka;
CREATE TABLE rsiedldb.upi_txn_kafka
(
raw_json String
)
ENGINE = Kafka
SETTINGS
kafka_broker_list = '10.0.20.199:30025',
kafka_topic_list = 'postProcessorTopic',
kafka_group_name = 'cg_upitxn_ch',
kafka_format = 'RawBLOB',
kafka_num_consumers = 8;
This one previously worked. Please let me know about the error. All the poll job seems to be timed out. but
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rsiedldb.upi_txn_kafka (id INTEGER, raw_json VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, raw_json FROM rsiedldb.upi_txn_kafka WHERE id = 1;
ALTER TABLE rsiedldb.upi_txn_kafka ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR DEFAULT 'active';
key_bug_features: Error consuming from Kafka table in ClickHouse
